```{=html}
                <span style="color:#86efac">Severity Only wins: 7.5 &lt; 8.0</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Deterioration panel -->
          <div id="mvp-det" style="flex:1;min-height:0;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;overflow:auto">
            <div style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;flex-shrink:0">
              Example 2 · Crisis conditions
            </div>
            <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0">
              <thead><tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)">
                <th style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;font-weight:500">Field</th>
                <th style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;font-weight:500">Value</th>
              </tr></thead>
              <tbody>
                <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"><td style="padding:5px 8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">Priority 4 patients</td><td style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#f9a8d4">10</td></tr>
                <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"><td style="padding:5px 8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">Priority 3 patients</td><td style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#f9a8d4">20</td></tr>
                <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"><td style="padding:5px 8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">Priority 2 patients</td><td style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#f9a8d4">30</td></tr>
                <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"><td style="padding:5px 8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">Priority 1 patients</td><td style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#f9a8d4">40</td></tr>
                <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"><td style="padding:5px 8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">Total ICU beds</td><td style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#f9a8d4">80</td></tr>
                <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"><td style="padding:5px 8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">Occupied ICU beds</td><td style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#f9a8d4">50</td></tr>
                <tr><td style="padding:5px 8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">Surge condition</td><td style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#f9a8d4">Crisis</td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
            <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:7px;padding:9px 11px;flex-shrink:0">
              <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px">Why deterioration wins</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);line-height:1.6">
                Same patients, crisis multiplier 1.5×. Severity Only: <strong style="color:var(--white)">27.9</strong> deaths.<br>
                Deterioration Only: <strong style="color:var(--white)">26.25</strong> deaths.<br>
                <span style="color:#86efac">Deterioration Only wins: 26.25 &lt; 27.9</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>
      
</section>
<script>
function downloadAllCSV(){
  const files = [
    "CSV files/prototype_patient_A_triage1.csv",
    "CSV files/prototype_patient_B_triage2.csv",
    "CSV files/prototype_patient_C_triage3.csv",
    "CSV files/prototype_patient_D_triage4.csv"
  ];

  files.forEach(f=>{
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = f;
    a.download = f.split("/").pop();
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
  });
}
</script>
</div>

<!-- MODALS -->
<div class="mo" id="modal-m1" onclick="coOut(event,'modal-m1')">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="mx" onclick="closeModal('modal-m1')">×</button>
    <div class="m-ey">Model 1 · Severity Classification</div>
    <h3>How we classify COVID-19 severity from metabolomics.</h3>
    <div class="m-sub">Six-stage walkthrough of the severity pipeline, end to end.</div>
    <div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">01</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Dataset · CBD</div><div class="mstep-b">43 hospitalised patients · 529 metabolites + 58 clinical vars · Delta &amp; Omicron (Mexico). <strong>Source:</strong> Mendeley Data · TMIC MEGA Assay.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">02</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Label binarisation</div><div class="mstep-b">3-class → binary: <strong>non-severe</strong> (n=14) vs <strong>severe+critical</strong> (n=25). Small per-class sample made 3-class modelling unreliable.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">03</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Preprocessing</div><div class="mstep-b">Missing standardisation → feature filtering (&gt;30%) → constant removal → median imputation → z-score. All inside CV folds — no leakage.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">04</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Feature selection</div><div class="mstep-b">ExtraTreesClassifier inside training folds → SelectFromModel. <strong>k evaluated:</strong> [5,10,20,30,50,75,100]. <strong>Final:</strong> 30 features from 568 candidates.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">05</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Train six candidates</div><div class="mstep-b">Elastic Net · Extra Trees · XGBoost · SVM (RBF) · Gaussian NB · MLP — stratified 5-fold CV + GridSearchCV. <strong>Primary metric:</strong> macro F1.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">06</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Threshold tuning</div><div class="mstep-b">Grid 0.05–0.95 (step 0.01), optimising macro F1. <strong>Default 0.50 confirmed optimal.</strong> Severe recall 0.96 — 24 of 25 severe patients correctly identified.</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="m-sel"><strong>Selected: Gaussian Naive Bayes</strong> — highest macro F1 (0.810) and precision (0.882). Stable IQR across folds. Simpler and more efficient than ensemble/kernel methods — suitable for rapid clinical deployment.</div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="mo" id="modal-m2" onclick="coOut(event,'modal-m2')">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="mx" onclick="closeModal('modal-m2')">×</button>
    <div class="m-ey">Model 2 · Deterioration Prediction</div>
    <h3>How we predict patient deterioration trajectory.</h3>
    <div class="m-sub">Six-stage walkthrough with patient-grouped cross-validation.</div>
    <div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">01</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Dataset · CLD</div><div class="mstep-b">339 patients · repeated plasma metabolomics at day 0,3,7,14,28,84. <strong>Source:</strong> Metabolomics Workbench ST001849 · Patti et al. (2021).</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">02</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Label construction &amp; leakage prevention</div><div class="mstep-b"><strong>Deteriorating:</strong> ICU admission after sample OR death within 30 days. <strong>Grouped CV</strong> by patient ID — all samples from one patient stay in the same fold.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">03</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Preprocessing</div><div class="mstep-b">Feature filtering (&gt;50%) → constant removal → median imputation → z-score. Categorical encoding for demographics. All inside CV folds.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">04</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Feature selection</div><div class="mstep-b">ExtraTrees → SelectFromModel. <strong>k evaluated:</strong> [50,75,100]. <strong>Final:</strong> 100 features. C=0.05 further reduces effective dimensionality.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">05</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Train six candidates</div><div class="mstep-b">Elastic Net · Extra Trees · XGBoost · SVM · Gaussian NB · MLP — grouped 5-fold CV. Elastic Net: AUROC 0.863, F1 0.778, bal-acc 0.784. Gaussian NB weakest — conditional independence violated by correlated metabolomics.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">06</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Threshold optimisation</div><div class="mstep-b">Grid 0.05–0.95 (step 0.01). <strong>Optimal: 0.52.</strong> Final: 179 TP · 289 TN · 64 FP · 61 FN.</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="m-sel"><strong>Selected: Elastic Net Logistic Regression</strong> — strongest across AUROC, F1, and balanced accuracy on grouped CV. Sparse regularisation (C=0.05, L1 ratio=0.25) effective for high-dimensional metabolomic prediction.</div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="mo" id="modal-m3" onclick="coOut(event,'modal-m3')">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="mx" onclick="closeModal('modal-m3')">×</button>
    <div class="m-ey">Models 1.2 &amp; 2.2 · Rapid-test variants</div>
    <h3>Clinically feasible predictions without full metabolomic profiling.</h3>
    <div class="m-sub">Restricted feature sets for deployment across hospitals with differing lab capabilities.</div>
    <div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">01</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Motivation</div><div class="mstep-b">Full metabolomic profiling unavailable in many emergency settings. Rapid-test variants use only features <strong>common to both CBD and CLD</strong> with &lt;24h turnaround — obtainable at admission.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">02</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Feature panel</div><div class="mstep-b">CBD ∩ CLD intersection → no-lab variables + metabolites with &lt;24h turnaround. <strong>Result:</strong> 57 features for M1.2 · 42 features for M2.2.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">03</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Model 1.2 · Elastic Net · 18 features</div><div class="mstep-b">AUROC 0.890 · F1 0.863 · bal-acc 0.890. <strong>Better than full-feature Model 1.0</strong> — reduced noise from high-dimensional space improves generalisation on small sample (n=39).</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">04</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Why rapid-test outperforms?</div><div class="mstep-b">529 CBD metabolites introduced redundancy. Restricted panel forces selection of the most generalisable signals, reducing overfitting.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">05</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Model 2.2 · MLP · threshold 0.49</div><div class="mstep-b">AUROC 0.789 · F1 0.740 · bal-acc 0.727. Confusion matrix: 162 TP · 283 TN · 70 FP · 78 FN.</div></div></div>
      <div class="mstep"><div class="mstep-n">06</div><div><div class="mstep-t">Clinical deployment</div><div class="mstep-b">Select full or rapid-test model based on available lab infrastructure. Same preprocessing pipeline for both variants.</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="m-sel"><strong>Key finding:</strong> M1.2 AUROC 0.890 vs full-feature 0.772 — 18 clinically accessible features capture the most informative severity signals.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="snav">
  <button class="sp" data-slides="0" onclick="go(0)"><span class="sn">01</span> Title</button>
  <button class="sp" data-slides="1" onclick="go(1)"><span class="sn">02</span> Introduction</button>
  <button class="sp" data-slides="2,3,4" onclick="go(2)"><span class="sn">03–05</span> Methods</button>
  <button class="sp" data-slides="5,6" onclick="go(5)"><span class="sn">06–07</span> Results</button>
  <button class="sp" data-slides="7" onclick="go(7)"><span class="sn">08</span> Discussion</button>
  <button class="sp" data-slides="8" onclick="go(8)"><span class="sn">09</span> MVP</button>
  <div class="narr">
    <button class="nb" id="pv">‹</button>
    <button class="nb" id="nx">›</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const slides=document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
const total=slides.length;
let cur=0,anim=false;
const pbar=document.getElementById('pbar');

function upd(){
  pbar.style.width=((cur+1)/total*100)+'%';
  document.querySelectorAll('.sp').forEach(p=>{
    const sl=p.dataset.slides.split(',').map(Number);
    p.classList.toggle('on',sl.includes(cur));
  });
}

function animBars(i){
  if(i!==3){
    document.querySelectorAll('#s3b .pip2-node').forEach(n=>{
      n.classList.remove('vis','active-node');n.style.opacity='0';n.style.transform='translateY(8px)';
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('#s3b .pip2-arr').forEach(a=>a.style.opacity='0');
  }
  if(i===3) setTimeout(animPipeline,100);
  const map={5:['b1_f1','b1_auroc'],6:['b2_f1','b2_auroc']};
  if(map[i]) map[i].forEach(id=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('#'+id+' .bf').forEach(b=>{
      b.style.width='0%';
      setTimeout(()=>{b.style.width=b.dataset.w+'%';},80);
    });
  });
}

function go(n){
  if(anim||n===cur||n<0||n>=total)return;
  anim=true;
  slides[cur].classList.add('out');slides[cur].classList.remove('active');
  setTimeout(()=>{
    slides[cur].classList.remove('out');cur=n;
    slides[cur].classList.add('active');upd();animBars(cur);anim=false;
  },340);
}

document.getElementById('nx').onclick=()=>go(cur+1);
document.getElementById('pv').onclick=()=>go(cur-1);
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  if(e.key==='ArrowRight'||e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();go(cur+1);}
  if(e.key==='ArrowLeft'){e.preventDefault();go(cur-1);}
  if(e.key==='Escape')document.querySelectorAll('.mo.open').forEach(m=>m.classList.remove('open'));
});
let tx=0;
document.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{tx=e.touches[0].clientX;});
document.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{const d=e.changedTouches[0].clientX-tx;if(Math.abs(d)>50){d<0?go(cur+1):go(cur-1);}});

upd();

function openModal(id){document.getElementById('modal-'+id).classList.add('open');}
function closeModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');}
function coOut(e,id){if(e.target===document.getElementById(id))closeModal(id);}

function showCM(id){
  const panel = document.getElementById(id);
  if(!panel) return;
  const allPanels = panel.closest('.col-r').querySelectorAll('.cm-panel');
  const allTabs = panel.closest('.col-r').querySelectorAll('.cm-tab');
  allPanels.forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  allTabs.forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  panel.classList.add('active');
  const idx = Array.from(allPanels).indexOf(panel);
  if(allTabs[idx]) allTabs[idx].classList.add('active');
}
let ppCur=0;
function ppGo(n){
  if(n<0||n>4)return;
  document.getElementById('pp'+ppCur).classList.remove('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.pp-dot')[ppCur].classList.remove('active');
  ppCur=n;
  document.getElementById('pp'+ppCur).classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.pp-dot')[ppCur].classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('pp-hint').textContent=ppCur===4?'all done':'click to advance';
}
function rtSwitch(panel){
  document.querySelectorAll('.rt-panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.rt-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  document.getElementById('rt-'+panel).classList.add('on');
  event.target.classList.add('on');
}

function mvpTab(t){
  const isSev = t==='sev';
  document.getElementById('mvp-sev').style.display = isSev ? 'flex' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('mvp-det').style.display = isSev ? 'none' : 'flex';
  const sevBtn = document.getElementById('mvp-tab-sev');
  const detBtn = document.getElementById('mvp-tab-det');
  sevBtn.style.background = isSev ? 'var(--white)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,.08)';
  sevBtn.style.color = isSev ? 'var(--navy)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,.5)';
  detBtn.style.background = isSev ? 'rgba(255,255,255,.08)' : 'var(--white)';
  detBtn.style.color = isSev ? 'rgba(255,255,255,.5)' : 'var(--navy)';
}


const pipData = {
  f1:{ey:'Full model · Step 01',title:'All features',
    statFull:'568',statFullLbl:'CBD features',statRapid:'593',statRapidLbl:'CLD features',
    body:'All metabolites and clinical variables retained after missingness filtering. Both datasets enter with full dimensionality — no feature constraints at this stage.',
    why:'568 features · 39 patients. The ratio alone makes overfitting a serious risk without downstream selection.',
    whyColor:'var(--blue)'},
  f2:{ey:'Full model · Step 02',title:'Any lab turnaround',
    statFull:'529',statFullLbl:'metabolites eligible',statRapid:'∞',statRapidLbl:'turnaround limit',
    body:'No constraint on how long lab results take. Full metabolomic profiling via targeted assays — specialist LC-MS equipment required. Rich signal, limited deployability.',
    why:'Specialist infrastructure is unavailable in most ED settings, especially during a surge.',
    whyColor:'var(--red)'},
  r1:{ey:'Rapid-test · Step 01',title:'Restricted panel',
    body:'CBD ∩ CLD intersection — 47 overlapping metabolites found. 12 removed for >24h turnaround. 35 remain, split into two panels with model-specific clinical variables added.',
    why:'Fewer features forced the most generalisable signals. M1.2 AUROC 0.890 vs full model 0.772.',
    whyColor:'var(--green)'},
  r2:{ey:'Rapid-test · Step 02',title:'<24h turnaround only',
    statFull:'42',statFullLbl:'M2.2 panel features',statRapid:'<24h',statRapidLbl:'max turnaround',
    body:'Metabolites with clinical turnaround under 24 hours only — routine blood panels and point-of-care assays — plus patient history variables requiring zero testing.',
    why:'Triage decisions are made within hours of admission. A 72h assay provides no actionable lead time.',
    whyColor:'var(--blue)'},
  s3:{ey:'Shared · Step 03',title:'ExtraTrees selection',
    statFull:'30',statFullLbl:'final k · M1',statRapid:'100',statRapidLbl:'final k · M2',
    body:'ExtraTreesClassifier scores importance inside each training fold. SelectFromModel retains top k — k itself tuned via GridSearchCV. Both variants use identical logic; only the candidate pool differs.',
    why:'Selection inside CV folds prevents leakage — a common source of inflated performance in metabolomics studies.',
    whyColor:'var(--blue)'},
  s4:{ey:'Shared · Step 04',title:'5-fold CV + GridSearchCV',
    statFull:'Strat.',statFullLbl:'M1 / M1.2 folds',statRapid:'Grouped',statRapidLbl:'M2 / M2.2 folds',
    body:'All six candidates evaluated under 5-fold CV with GridSearchCV tuning on training folds only. M1 uses stratified splits; M2 groups all timepoints from the same patient into the same fold.',
    why:'Grouped CV prevents temporal leakage — the same patient\'s day-0 and day-14 samples must never span folds.',
    whyColor:'var(--navy)'},
  s5:{ey:'Shared · Step 05',title:'Threshold + model selection',
    statFull:'0.50',statFullLbl:'M1 optimal threshold',statRapid:'0.52',statRapidLbl:'M2 optimal threshold',
    body:'Threshold swept 0.05→0.95 in 0.01 steps on CV predictions, optimising macro F1. Best macro F1 model selected. Equally weights both classes — robust to class imbalance.',
    why:'Default 0.50 assumes equal error cost. In triage, a missed severe case is far worse than a false alarm.',
    whyColor:'var(--red)'},
};

function pipDetail(key){
  document.querySelectorAll('.pip2-node').forEach(n=>n.classList.remove('active-node'));

  const nodeMap={
    f1:'pn-f1',f2:'pn-f2',
    r1:'pn-r1',r2:'pn-r2',
    s3:'pn-f3',s4:'pn-f4',s5:'pn-f5'
  };

  const mirrorMap={
    s3:'pn-r3',
    s4:'pn-r4',
    s5:'pn-r5'
  };

  const node=document.getElementById(nodeMap[key]);
  if(node) node.classList.add('active-node');

  if(mirrorMap[key]){
    const m=document.getElementById(mirrorMap[key]);
    if(m) m.classList.add('active-node');
  }

  const d=pipData[key];
  if(!d) return;

  const box=document.getElementById('pip2-detail-box');
  box.style.opacity='0';

  setTimeout(()=>{

    // update text content only
    document.getElementById('pd-ey').textContent=d.ey;
    document.getElementById('pd-title').textContent=d.title;
    document.getElementById('pd-body').innerHTML=d.body;
    document.getElementById('pd-why-body').textContent=d.why;

    // IMPORTANT: stats always update, no branching logic that resets visuals
    document.getElementById('pd-stat-full').textContent=d.statFull || '';
    document.getElementById('pd-stat-full-lbl').textContent=d.statFullLbl || '';
    document.getElementById('pd-stat-rapid').textContent=d.statRapid || '';
    document.getElementById('pd-stat-rapid-lbl').textContent=d.statRapidLbl || '';

    const why=document.getElementById('pd-why');
    const whyLabel=document.getElementById('pd-why-label');
    const col=d.whyColor;

    why.style.borderLeftColor=col;
    why.style.background=
      col==='var(--green)' ? '#f0fdf4' :
      col==='var(--red)' ? '#fef2f2' :
      col==='var(--navy)' ? 'var(--off)' :
      'var(--blue-l)';

    if(whyLabel) whyLabel.style.color=col;

    // ONLY toggle visibility of animation panel (no resets)
    const isAnim = (key === 'r1');

    document.getElementById('pd-stat').style.display = isAnim ? 'none' : 'flex';
    document.getElementById('pd-venn').style.display = isAnim ? 'flex' : 'none';

    box.style.opacity='1';

    // IMPORTANT CHANGE:
    // DO NOT reset dots, DO NOT call vennStep here anymore
    // animation is controlled externally only

  },150);
}


// dot coordinate pools
const CBD_UNIQUE=[[30,50],[18,70],[28,90],[50,40],[56,100],[10,62],[42,108],[18,82],[38,30],[58,78],[22,55],[48,62],[30,82],[12,77],[44,37],[20,95],[54,48],[8,85],[36,115],[60,55],[14,40],[40,100],[24,68],[52,90],[16,115]];
const CLD_UNIQUE=[[350,50],[362,70],[352,90],[340,40],[334,100],[380,62],[348,108],[375,82],[362,30],[330,78],[368,55],[342,62],[360,82],[380,77],[346,37],[370,95],[334,48],[382,85],[354,115],[330,55],[376,40],[340,100],[364,68],[352,90],[366,115]];
const SHARED_IN_CBD=[[68,45],[75,62],[62,78],[80,55],[70,90],[58,68],[76,40],[65,85],[72,100],[60,52],[78,72],[55,88],[82,65],[68,110],[73,48],[57,75],[79,95],[63,58],[71,82],[66,42],[74,68],[59,95],[81,50],[67,78],[76,110],[62,40],[70,60],[78,85],[64,100],[72,30],[58,82],[80,45],[66,70],[74,92],[60,115]];
const SHARED_IN_CLD=[[332,45],[325,62],[338,78],[320,55],[330,90],[342,68],[324,40],[335,85],[328,100],[340,52],[322,72],[345,88],[318,65],[332,110],[327,48],[343,75],[321,95],[337,58],[329,82],[334,42],[326,68],[341,95],[319,50],[333,78],[324,110],[338,40],[330,60],[322,85],[336,100],[328,30],[342,82],[320,45],[334,70],[326,92],[340,115]];
const SHARED_CENTRE=Array.from({length:35},(_,i)=>{const c=6,r=Math.floor(i/c),col=i%c;return[170+col*12,30+r*22];});
const REMOVED_CENTRE=Array.from({length:12},(_,i)=>{const c=6,r=Math.floor(i/c),col=i%c;return[170+col*12,138+r*18];});
const M12_DOTS=Array.from({length:35},(_,i)=>{const c=5,r=Math.floor(i/c),col=i%c;return[28+col*18,28+r*22];});
const M12_CLINICAL=Array.from({length:22},(_,i)=>{const c=5,r=Math.floor(i/c),col=i%c;return[28+col*18,138+r*14];});
const M22_DOTS=Array.from({length:35},(_,i)=>{const c=5,r=Math.floor(i/c),col=i%c;return[228+col*18,28+r*22];});
const M22_CLINICAL=Array.from({length:7},(_,i)=>[228+i*22,138]);

const VENN_STEPS=[
  {label:'Step 1 of 5 · Two feature pools',desc:'CBD (568 features) and CLD (593 features) as separate pools. Dark dots are the 47 metabolites present in both datasets.'},
  {label:'Step 2 of 5 · Shared metabolites emerge',desc:'The 47 overlapping metabolites migrate to a shared centre zone — candidates for the rapid-test panel.'},
  {label:'Step 3 of 5 · Remove slow-turnaround',desc:'12 metabolites with >24h lab turnaround are removed (faded red). 35 shared metabolites remain — all obtainable within 24 hours.'},
  {label:'Step 4 of 5 · Split into two panels',desc:'The 35 shared metabolites are assigned to both models. M1.2 receives the left panel (blue), M2.2 the right (teal).'},
  {label:'Step 5 of 5 · Add clinical variables',desc:'M1.2 receives 22 Model-1-only clinical variables (symptoms, comorbidities) → 57 total. M2.2 receives 7 variables (treatment, onset data) → 42 total.'},
];

let vennCurrentStep=0;

function setText(id,opacity){
  const el=document.getElementById(id);
  if(el) el.setAttribute('opacity',opacity);
}

function makeDot(x,y,fill,r=2.5,opacity=0.5){
  const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
  c.setAttribute('cx',x);c.setAttribute('cy',y);c.setAttribute('r',r);
  c.setAttribute('fill',fill);c.setAttribute('opacity',opacity);
  c.style.transition='cx 0.7s cubic-bezier(.34,1.1,.64,1),cy 0.7s cubic-bezier(.34,1.1,.64,1),opacity 0.4s ease,fill 0.4s ease,r 0.3s ease';
  return c;
}

function vennStep(step){
  const label=document.getElementById('venn-step-label');
  const desc=document.getElementById('venn-desc');
  const btn=document.getElementById('venn-next-btn');
  if(label) label.textContent=VENN_STEPS[step].label;
  if(desc) desc.textContent=VENN_STEPS[step].desc;
  if(btn) btn.textContent=step===4?'replay ↺':'next →';

  ['vl-cbd','vl-cld','vl-shared','vl-removed','vl-m12','vl-m22'].forEach(id=>setText(id,0));

  if(step===0){
    ['vd-cbd','vd-cld','vd-shared','vd-m1only','vd-m2only'].forEach(id=>{document.getElementById(id).innerHTML='';});
    const cbdG=document.getElementById('vd-cbd');
    const cldG=document.getElementById('vd-cld');
    CBD_UNIQUE.forEach(([x,y],i)=>{
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const c=makeDot(x,y,'#93c5fd',2.5,0);
        cbdG.appendChild(c);
        requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>c.setAttribute('opacity','0.45')));
      },i*15);
    });
    CLD_UNIQUE.forEach(([x,y],i)=>{
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const c=makeDot(x,y,'#7dd3fc',2.5,0);
        cldG.appendChild(c);
        requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>c.setAttribute('opacity','0.45')));
      },i*15);
    });
    SHARED_IN_CBD.forEach(([x,y],i)=>{
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const c=makeDot(x,y,'#1a2e4a',3,0);
        cbdG.appendChild(c);
        requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>c.setAttribute('opacity','0.9')));
      },i*15+200);
    });
    SHARED_IN_CLD.forEach(([x,y],i)=>{
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const c=makeDot(x,y,'#1a2e4a',3,0);
        cldG.appendChild(c);
        requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>c.setAttribute('opacity','0.9')));
      },i*15+200);
    });
    setTimeout(()=>{setText('vl-cbd',1);setText('vl-cld',1);},700);
  }

  if(step===1){
    ['vd-cbd','vd-cld','vd-shared','vd-m1only','vd-m2only'].forEach(id=>{document.getElementById(id).innerHTML='';});
    const cbdG=document.getElementById('vd-cbd');
    const cldG=document.getElementById('vd-cld');
    const sharedG=document.getElementById('vd-shared');
    CBD_UNIQUE.forEach(([x,y])=>cbdG.appendChild(makeDot(x,y,'#93c5fd',2.5,0.45)));
    CLD_UNIQUE.forEach(([x,y])=>cldG.appendChild(makeDot(x,y,'#7dd3fc',2.5,0.45)));
    SHARED_CENTRE.forEach(([tx,ty],i)=>{
      const [sx,sy]=i<25?SHARED_IN_CBD[i]:SHARED_IN_CLD[i-25]||SHARED_IN_CBD[i%25];
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const c=makeDot(sx,sy,'#1a2e4a',3,0.9);
        sharedG.appendChild(c);
        requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
          c.setAttribute('cx',tx);c.setAttribute('cy',ty);
        }));
      },i*22);
    });
    setTimeout(()=>{setText('vl-shared',1);setText('vl-cbd',1);setText('vl-cld',1);},900);
  }

  if(step===2){
    document.getElementById('vd-shared').innerHTML='';
    const sharedG=document.getElementById('vd-shared');
    SHARED_CENTRE.forEach(([x,y],i)=>{
      const removed=i>=23;
      const c=makeDot(x,y,removed?'#c0392b':'#1a2e4a',removed?2:3,0.9);
      sharedG.appendChild(c);
      if(removed){
        setTimeout(()=>{c.setAttribute('opacity','0.12');c.setAttribute('r','1.5');},350+i*28);
      }
    });
    setTimeout(()=>setText('vl-removed',1),850);
    setTimeout(()=>{setText('vl-cbd',1);setText('vl-cld',1);},100);
  }

  if(step===3){
    ['vd-shared','vd-m1only','vd-m2only'].forEach(id=>{document.getElementById(id).innerHTML='';});
    const sharedG=document.getElementById('vd-shared');
    SHARED_CENTRE.slice(0,23).forEach(([sx,sy],i)=>{
      const [tx,ty]=M12_DOTS[i];
      const c=makeDot(sx,sy,'#1a2e4a',3,0.9);
      sharedG.appendChild(c);
      setTimeout(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
        c.setAttribute('cx',tx);c.setAttribute('cy',ty);c.setAttribute('fill','#2563eb');
      })),i*20);
    });
    SHARED_CENTRE.slice(0,23).forEach(([sx,sy],i)=>{
      const [tx,ty]=M22_DOTS[i];
      const c=makeDot(sx,sy,'#1a2e4a',3,0.9);
      sharedG.appendChild(c);
      setTimeout(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
        c.setAttribute('cx',tx);c.setAttribute('cy',ty);c.setAttribute('fill','#0ea5e9');
      })),i*20+80);
    });
    setTimeout(()=>{setText('vl-m12',1);setText('vl-m22',1);},750);
  }

  if(step===4){
    const m1G=document.getElementById('vd-m1only');
    const m2G=document.getElementById('vd-m2only');
    m1G.innerHTML='';m2G.innerHTML='';
    M12_CLINICAL.forEach(([x,y],i)=>{
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const c=makeDot(x,y,'#93c5fd',2.5,0);
        m1G.appendChild(c);
        requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>c.setAttribute('opacity','0.75')));
      },i*35);
    });
    M22_CLINICAL.forEach(([x,y],i)=>{
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const c=makeDot(x,y,'#7dd3fc',2.5,0);
        m2G.appendChild(c);
        requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>c.setAttribute('opacity','0.75')));
      },i*35+150);
    });
    setTimeout(()=>{setText('vl-m12',1);setText('vl-m22',1);},500);
  }
}

function vennNext(){
  vennCurrentStep=vennCurrentStep===4?0:vennCurrentStep+1;
  vennStep(vennCurrentStep);
}

function animVenn(){
  vennCurrentStep=0;
  ['vd-cbd','vd-cld','vd-shared','vd-m1only','vd-m2only'].forEach(id=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(el) el.innerHTML='';
  });
  ['vl-cbd','vl-cld','vl-shared','vl-removed','vl-m12','vl-m22'].forEach(id=>setText(id,0));
  setTimeout(()=>vennStep(0),100);
}

function animPipeline(){
  const allNodes=document.querySelectorAll('#s3b .pip2-node');
  const allArrs=document.querySelectorAll('#s3b .pip2-arr');
  allNodes.forEach(n=>{n.classList.remove('vis','active-node');n.style.opacity='0';n.style.transform='translateY(8px)';});
  allArrs.forEach(a=>{a.style.opacity='0';});
  const pairs=[
    ['pn-f1','pn-r1','pa-f1','pa-r1'],
    ['pn-f2','pn-r2','pa-f2','pa-r2'],
    ['pn-f3','pn-r3','pa-f3','pa-r3'],
    ['pn-f4','pn-r4','pa-f4','pa-r4'],
    ['pn-f5','pn-r5','pa-f5','pa-r5'],
  ];
  pairs.forEach((pair,i)=>{
    setTimeout(()=>{
      pair.forEach(id=>{
        const el=document.getElementById(id);
        if(!el) return;
        if(el.classList.contains('pip2-node')){el.style.opacity='1';el.style.transform='translateY(0)';}
        else el.style.opacity='1';
      });
    },i*110);
  });
  setTimeout(()=>{
    const first=document.getElementById('pn-f1');
    if(first){first.classList.add('active-node');pipDetail('f1');}
  },pairs.length*110+100);
}

function animVenn(){
  vennCurrentStep=0;
  ['vd-cbd','vd-cld','vd-shared','vd-m1only','vd-m2only'].forEach(id=>{
    document.getElementById(id).innerHTML='';
  });
  ['vl-cbd','vl-cld','vl-shared','vl-removed','vl-m12','vl-m22'].forEach(id=>setText(id,0));
  setTimeout(()=>vennStep(0),100);
}
</script>
```
